scenarios.starting_prompt: I need help with a work trip
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask to search flights from SFO to JFK on June 15. After seeing results, ask to book the cheapest option. Then submit a $45 meal expense from the trip for user EMP001.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I have several things to handle for my Chicago trip
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask about hotel options in Chicago under $300. Then ask about the expense policy for entertainment. Finally submit a $120 entertainment expense for user EMP002.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Can you help me with travel and expenses?
scenarios.conversation_plan: First ask to search hotels in New York. Then ask to check if a $50 meal expense is within policy. Accept the answers and thank the agent.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I need to plan my upcoming business trip to Miami
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask about available flights to Miami. Then ask about hotel options. Finally ask about the lodging expense limit and whether the hotel prices fit within policy.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Hi, I have a quick expense question
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask if a $200 transport expense is within corporate policy. If it is, ask to submit it for user EMP003. Then ask to see the expense history for EMP003.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I need to handle my trip logistics
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask to search flights from LAX to Chicago. Then ask to book the best option for Jane Smith. After booking, ask to submit the flight cost as a transport expense.

scenarios.starting_prompt: What can you help me with for corporate travel?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent what services it provides. Then ask to search for hotels in London. Finally ask about the expense policy for supplies.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I need to submit several expenses from my recent trip
scenarios.conversation_plan: Submit a $65 meal expense for user EMP001. Then submit a $350 lodging expense. Then ask to see the full expense history for EMP001.
